author: dcho
description: Ticket scope: Profiling shows the parser re-reads the whole tree on every run; cache stat results.
title: Speed up the config-file parser on large repos

author: m.alvarez
description: Ticket scope: First-run setup blocks indefinitely if ~/.cache is not writable; fail fast with a clear error.
title: CLI hangs when the cache directory is read-only

author: priya-k
description: Ticket scope: Detect non-TTY stdout and disable ANSI codes; add an explicit --no-color override.
title: Add a --no-color flag for piped output
